# terrible_check_point_mgmt_cp_mgmt_https_rule (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against
- `name` (String) Rule name.

### Optional

- `action` (String) Rule inspect level. "Bypass" or "Inspect".
- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `blade` (String) Blades for HTTPS Inspection. Identified by Name or UID of the blade.
- `certificate` (String) Internal Server Certificate identified by Name or UID, otherwise, "Outbound Certificate" is a default value.
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `comments` (String) Comments string.
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `destination` (String) Collection of Network objects identified by Name or UID that represents connection destination.
- `destination_negate` (Boolean) TRUE if "negate" value is set for Destination.
- `details_level` (String) The level of detail for some of the fields in the response can vary from showing only the UID value of the object to a fully detailed representation of the object.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Enable/Disable the rule.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of nameâ†’value).
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `ignore_warnings` (Boolean) Apply changes ignoring warnings.
- `install_on` (String) Which Gateways identified by the name or UID to install the policy on.
- `layer` (String) Layer that holds the Object. Identified by the Name or UID.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `position` (String) Position in the rulebase.
- `service` (String) Collection of Network objects identified by Name or UID that represents connection service.
- `service_negate` (Boolean) TRUE if "negate" value is set for Service.
- `site_category` (String) Collection of Site Categories objects identified by the name or UID.
- `site_category_negate` (Boolean) TRUE if "negate" value is set for Site Category.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `source` (String) Collection of Network objects identified by Name or UID that represents connection source.
- `source_negate` (Boolean) TRUE if "negate" value is set for Source.
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `track` (String) a "None","Log","Alert","Mail","SNMP trap","Mail","User Alert 1", "User Alert 2", "User Alert 3".
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `cp_mgmt_https_rule` (String) The checkpoint object created or updated.
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
